GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when the user asks to analyze data using Tableau Next, including inquiries about metrics, trends, or dashboards.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query is about summarizing dashboard contents, use Analytics__SummarizeDashboard.
If the query is about analyzing specific metrics or trends, use Analytics__AnalyzeMetric.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only analyze data using Tableau Next and provide insights on metrics, trends, or dashboards. You cannot perform non-analytic tasks or manage alerts.
